items.title: [正面] In short - came for Mythos, stayed for Mythos and ...
items.summary:
In short - came for Mythos, stayed for Mythos and feels. Was expecting something trivial and low-quality, but was pleasantly surprised by how well-thought and well-made it is. Just don't drop it if you don't see a lot of eldritch horror immediately, story takes a bit of time to build up.

Is it gacha? Yes. Is it stingy? It is as-much-not as possible. Devs are ridiculously generous.
Story is incredible and very big at this point. Also it has a legit well-written OTP, which is a very rare sight in gacha world and thus commendable.
Battles range from "easy" to "OMG why so hard" and system of four realms is done incredibly good (they have NO ELEMENTS! may the thousand blessings be with them), allowing very cool cross-realm gameplay.
Characters also range in all possible scales, from friendly to hateful, from young to old, from stoic to horny (although it is literally one character) to deeply tragic.

Overall 10/10 (can deduce one because bulk of story is not voiced, but come on, even top-level competitors don't have full voice-overs nowadays) and super happy i've discovered it.

items.title: [正面] 刚开始玩：和大多数常规手游差不多，但是是克苏鲁主题，还是肉鸽战斗系统，所以我喜欢。美术和剧情都很不错...
items.summary:
刚开始玩：和大多数常规手游差不多，但是是克苏鲁主题，还是肉鸽战斗系统，所以我喜欢。美术和剧情都很不错。
手机加电脑玩了快80小时后：妈呀我太喜欢这个游戏了。越玩越香，美酒。真是被埋没的宝玉。
整个游戏非常舒适，对于很多小细节我都很喜欢。
例如
*右下角的时间，全屏玩对于很喜欢看时间的我简直不要太爽。
*所有特殊词条鼠标一点就解释，不用翻教程和死记硬背。
*卡牌伤害都是帮你算好的，而不是只显示“攻击力的150%”。

items.title:
[正面] 大家好，我是一名电脑维修员，我来自2008年，今天的我在给香港知名演员陈冠希先生修电脑硬盘，
冠希...
items.summary:
大家好，我是一名电脑维修员，我来自2008年，今天的我在给香港知名演员陈冠希先生修电脑硬盘，
冠希哥的电脑硬盘有很严重的问题，里面的视频都随时可能观看不了，还好我技术过硬，精通计算机，
用了祖传的医术治好了冠希哥的电脑，冠希哥这个人很喜欢记录生活啊，电脑硬盘里可见的12个宠物的照片视频，
每个宠物都非常听话，里面有陈冠希给宠物洗澡，还有冠希哥喂宠物吃火腿，陈冠希给宠物穿黑色渔网裤子，很是潮流，
下面是陈冠希给我分享的照片，展示了陈冠希先生高超的摄影技术，以及陈冠希先生平日里生活的点点滴滴，和她宠物之间的故事

items.title: [正面] As someone who enjoys deckbuilders, gachas, and ga...
items.summary: As someone who enjoys deckbuilders, gachas, and games that have a good chunk of grinding in them, I can highly recommend this game. It is relatively free-to play friendly, and has a very responsive dev team. I love the artstyle and gameplay themes. Thais and Ramona are best girls, 10/10.

items.title: [正面] Buen juego, muy entretenido para farmear y jugar c...
items.summary:
Buen juego, muy entretenido para farmear y jugar con la cabeza, es muy divertido estar haciendo cuentas mentales para ver cuánto daño le haré a los enemigos o también subir de nivel a los personajes combinando los artículos para hacer más daño o más defensa.
Lo recomiendo para pasar el rato sin ser tóxico o enojarte, en este juego solo hay que pasar el tiempo jugando los eventos que son muy buenos con desafíos muy entretenidos, espero que lo disfruten tanto como yo lo estoy disfrutando-
